summary: Retest of Chat.jsx after fixes to (1) SSE parser space handling and (2) Dashboard→Chat race condition. All 5 requested checks PASS. Zero pageerrors captured across three end-to-end flows.
critical_code_review_comments: Chat.jsx L214 fix (l.slice(5).replace(/^ /, '')) is correct per the SSE spec (only ONE leading U+0020 must be stripped). Inter-token spaces are preserved and multi-word markers render correctly.
Delta handler guard at L236-244 correctly pushes a fresh assistant message if the last message is missing/user, eliminating the TypeError seen in iteration 1.
parseAssistant regexes now use \s+ between multi-word markers ('Conclusi[oó]n\s+Estrat[eé]gica', 'Acciones\s+Recomendadas') — resilient to whitespace variants.
Nice-to-have (unchanged from iter 1): consider wrapping /app routes in an ErrorBoundary and adding data-testid to ThemeToggle.
seed_data_creation: None. Test session created 2 new conversations under the admin user via the real gpt-4.1-mini stream (via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat.jsx bugs from iter 1 are fully fixed. Verified: (1) Dashboard→'Consultar al Comité' navigates to /app/chat and streams without runtime overlay; user message renders; assistant renders with tags (Marketing/Ventas/Operaciones), styled Análisis, bordered Conclusión, bullet Acciones. (2) Direct typing in /app/chat streams and structures output identically; URL is rewritten to /app/chat/conv_xxx via meta event. (3) Loading /app/chat/:conversationId from Historial rehydrates prior conversation with the same structured rendering (Finanzas/Operaciones tags, Análisis, Conclusión, Acciones — 3 bullet items). No merged-words bad patterns detected (Paracrear, Elcomité, Estrategiade, parael, Análisisde all absent). No raw '## ...' or '[TAGS:' markers leak into the DOM. No PAGEERRORS captured in any of the three flows. Real LLM output verified end-to-end (not just 200 OK).

flow_history_reload.user_msg_hydrated: Dame 3 acciones concretas para reducir costos operativos.

rca of the issue: Iter 1 root causes are both resolved. RCA-1 (words merged): SSE spec allows a single optional leading space in a 'data:' field for readability; .trimStart() ate the second space that belonged to the token payload. Replacing with .replace(/^ /, '') removes only the one separator space per spec, so 'data:  Comité' yields ' Comité' (correct). RCA-2 (TypeError): the routeConvId effect and location.state effect both fired on initial mount; the setMessages([]) reset could win the race and produce an empty array by the time the first delta arrived at setMessages callback, which then indexed copy[copy.length-1] (undefined) and read .content. The defensive push at L236-244 makes the reducer self-healing regardless of ordering.
